articles.title: Carl Yastrzemski’s grandson, Braves’ Mike Yastrzemski, walks off Red Sox
articles.description:
Boston fell to 18-26 on the season.

The post Carl Yastrzemski’s grandson, Braves’ Mike Yastrzemski, walks off Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mike Yastrzemski hit a walk-off home run against the Red Sox on May 15.
Boston's record dropped to 18-26 after the loss to the Braves.
The defeat raises concerns among Boston fans about the team's performance this season.
